'''''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 6''' is the sixth volume in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'' graphic novels]] series.

==Publisher's summary==
''Four more thrilling tales of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in peril and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in jeopardy! The [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] grind through the galaxy, shaking every [[Star system/Legends|system]] to its core and testing loyalties on both sides of the conflict. The last days of the Jedi are at hand, but if their Order is to fall, they're going down swinging! Presenting another round of lightning-paced, action-packed, all-ages ''Star Wars'' goodness, all told in the same stripped-down stylization as Cartoon Network's micro-series.''

==Contents==
*"[[It Takes a Thief]]"
*"[[The Drop (comic story)|The Drop]]"
*"[[To the Vanishing Point]]"
*"[[Means and Ends]]"

==Continuity==
The cover depicts [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] with a green [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], but, in the story "[[It Takes a Thief]]," he has a blue one.
